nodes.label: हुदहुद (Hoopoe Bird)
nodes.description: Chapter 13 - A fascinating story about the beautiful hoopoe bird and its unique features

nodes.label: दिखावट (Appearance)
nodes.description: The hoopoe's beautiful and distinctive physical features that make it easy to identify

nodes.label: कलगी (Crest)
nodes.description: Fan-shaped crown of feathers on the head that opens and closes - the hoopoe's most famous feature

nodes.label: धारियाँ (Stripes)
nodes.description: Beautiful black and white stripes on the wings and body, with brownish-orange feathers

nodes.label: चोंच (Beak)
nodes.description: Long, thin, slightly curved beak used for digging insects out of the ground

nodes.label: भोजन (Food)
nodes.description: What the hoopoe eats and how it finds its food

nodes.label: कीड़े-मकोड़े (Insects)
nodes.description: The hoopoe eats insects, worms, and larvae by poking its beak into the soil

nodes.label: किसानों का मित्र (Farmer's Friend)
nodes.description: Helps farmers by eating harmful insects that damage crops in the fields

nodes.label: निवास स्थान (Habitat)
nodes.description: Where the hoopoe lives, builds its nest, and is found in India

nodes.label: घोंसला (Nest)
nodes.description: Nests in tree hollows, wall cracks, and holes in old buildings - does not build typical nests

nodes.label: खुले मैदान और बगीचे (Open Fields)
nodes.description: Prefers open fields, gardens, and farmlands where it can easily find insects in the ground

nodes.label: आवाज़ (Sound)
nodes.description: The hoopoe's distinctive 'hoop-hoop-hoop' call - the origin of its name 'hudhud'

nodes.label: पक्षी संरक्षण (Bird Conservation)
nodes.description: Why it is important to protect birds and their natural habitats

nodes.label: भाषा कार्य (Language Skills)
nodes.description: Hindi vocabulary and comprehension skills from this chapter

nodes.label: नए शब्द (New Words)
nodes.description: हुदहुद, कलगी, चोंच, कीड़े-मकोड़े, घोंसला, पंख, धारियाँ, प्रवासी पक्षी, पर्यावरण, संरक्षण
